_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Product and service monitoring involves developing a theory of change and measurement frameworks to understand effects of services on the user and the economy.
reference_document_element_description: Implement model monitoring dashboards and alerting, including performance degradation thresholds, drift detection, and incident response procedures.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-012 (DQ, cosine: 0.450), AI-K-024 (AI, cosine: 0.434).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.379). Shared vocabulary: [monitoring]. DDaT-only terms [change, developing, economy, effects, frameworks, involves] vs WIDAI-only terms [alerting, dashboards, degradation, detection, drift, implement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.866, R=0.875). Balanced P/R — the 24-word DDaT element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Product and service monitoring involves developing a theory of change and measur" and "Implement model monitoring dashboards and alerting, including performance degrad" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.448 > STS 0.379 (gap +0.069). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [monitoring] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Shared tokens: [monitoring]. DDaT-only: [change, developing, economy, effects, frameworks, involves]. WIDAI-only: [alerting, dashboards, degradation, detection, drift, implement].
